scope: Axon web palette and Android reusable primitive/control surfaces remaining after the completed Aurora split-brain cleanup.

classifications.aurora-ready: An existing Aurora primitive already covers the reusable surface; Axon should consume or resync it.
classifications.aurora-gap: Aurora needs a minimal generic API, prop, slot, or example before Axon migrates.
classifications.axon-composite: The local component encodes Axon-specific composition or semantics and may stay local if built from Aurora primitives/tokens.
classifications.stale-followup: An old split-brain follow-up whose remaining work is superseded, narrowed, or deferred by this inventory.

rows.current_primitive_smell: A raw button owns the minimized crawl job tray click target.
rows.upstream_requirement: Do not add an Aurora job-tray primitive unless reuse outside Axon is proven; use Aurora Button for the click target if visual parity allows.
rows.app_specific_exception: The tray copy, crawl progress summary, and app window restore behavior are Axon shell semantics.
expected_verification: palette visual parity for minimized crawl tray

rows.current_primitive_smell: Settings lists use a raw select wrapped in local chrome.
rows.upstream_requirement: Aurora web already exposes NativeSelect for simple settings value lists; no new registry primitive expected.

rows.current_primitive_smell: Settings-specific wrappers shape Input, Button, reveal, and toggle behavior locally.
rows.upstream_requirement: Use existing Aurora Input, Button, Field/InputGroup, and Switch surfaces; upstream only docs/examples or tiny generic props if inventory-backed migration proves a gap.
rows.app_specific_exception: The wrappers are Axon settings composites tied to settings-* CSS and monolith extraction boundaries.
rows.secret_classification: mixed: SecretInput holds tokens/secrets; TextInput and MiniToggle are non-secret

rows.current_primitive_smell: Palette carries a local Aurora-like scroll-area fork.
rows.upstream_requirement: Compare against Aurora registry scroll-area and document the chosen ref/props compatibility shape before Axon resyncs.

rows.current_primitive_smell: A dot-only operation status indicator is implemented locally.
rows.upstream_requirement: Aurora status-indicator should cover the reusable status surface; add only a minimal dot-only size/appearance API if migration proves the current API cannot express it.

rows.current_primitive_smell: Repeated app-local BasicTextField shells own compact composer and settings-field behavior.
rows.upstream_requirement: Extend AuroraTextField or AuroraPromptInput with compact/composer slots; BasicTextField belongs inside Aurora only when Material TextField cannot express the primitive.
rows.secret_classification: mixed: SettingsScreen token field is secret; prompt and non-token settings inputs are non-secret

rows.current_primitive_smell: Icon/action button shapes and size variants are implemented app-locally or with raw Material IconButton.
rows.upstream_requirement: Prefer extending AuroraButton with icon/action size/shape slots; add AuroraIconButton only if button slots cannot preserve semantics, enabled state, content descriptions, and 48dp target.

rows.current_primitive_smell: Tabs, chips, and switch rows are recurring app-local control shells.
rows.upstream_requirement: Try AuroraTabs, AuroraButtonGroup, AuroraSuggestionChip, and AuroraSwitch first; upstream only minimal generic slots/rows if proven missing.
rows.app_specific_exception: SwitchRow label/copy composition may remain local while the switch control is Aurora-owned.

rows.current_primitive_smell: Progress and dot-only status primitives are carried in Axon despite matching reusable Aurora status/progress roles.
rows.upstream_requirement: Use or extend AuroraProgress and AuroraStatusIndicator for size/track/tone/dot-only needs. Shimmer/gradient behavior stays Axon-local unless Aurora exposes static or opt-in animation defaults.
rows.app_specific_exception: Axon-specific shimmer/gradient progress may remain local if upstream reuse is not proven.

rows.current_primitive_smell: Navigation/sidebar row affordances overlap with Aurora navigation primitives, while Axon brand and shell semantics are local.
rows.upstream_requirement: Use Aurora NavigationRail/NavigationMenu/Sidebar generic rows or slots; upstream only generic row affordances, not Axon labels, orange accent, brand glyph, or shell overlay behavior.
rows.app_specific_exception: Axon owns app section names, brand glyph, overlay/sidebar orchestration, and command shell semantics.

rows.current_primitive_smell: Old raw input/kbd task from completed dab6 epic.
rows.upstream_requirement: Close or supersede after W-PAL-003 confirms no old input/kbd scope remains beyond settings-composite preservation.

rows.current_primitive_smell: Old raw button migration task from completed dab6 epic.
rows.upstream_requirement: Close or supersede after W-PAL-001 proves the only remaining raw app button is the audited idle-tray control.

rows.current_primitive_smell: Old vendored primitive sync task from completed dab6 epic.
rows.upstream_requirement: Defer only the scroll-area resync to W-PAL-004/hrqn.2-3; do not revive broad primitive sync scope.

rows.current_primitive_smell: Old Aurora Button disabled/asChild upstream port task.
rows.upstream_requirement: Confirm Aurora registry and generated artifacts already preserve Button disabled/loading asChild guards; keep only a targeted upstream verification if missing.
expected_verification: button disabled/asChild upstream test and public/r artifact check

stale_bead_recommendations.reason: Old raw input/kbd migration scope is complete except the audited settings composites, which now belong to hrqn.3 secret/settings verification.
The remaining raw web button is the idle-tray shell composite explicitly inventoried for hrqn.3.
Broad primitive resync should not be revived; only scroll-area compatibility/resync remains in the new sequence.
Button disabled/asChild behavior is now a targeted Aurora upstream verification under hrqn.2, not a free-standing old split-brain task.
